package rulecoverage

func NegativePreloadInsideLoop() string {
    ruleID := "preload_inside_loop"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "GORM Preload(...) queries configured and executed inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
